mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM USER_ACTIVITY_LOG ual WHERE 1=1
AND ual.action LIKE #{action, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler} || '%'
AND ual.result = #{result, jdbcType=VARCHAR, typeHandler=org.apache.ibatis.type.StringTypeHandler}
AND ual.occurred_at >= TO_TIMESTAMP(#{from}, 'YYYY-MM-DD')
AND ual.occurred_at < TO_TIMESTAMP(#{to}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') + 1
